name: CodeRabbit
description: Reviews pull requests with AI across GitHub, GitLab, Azure DevOps, and Bitbucket — flagging bugs, security issues, and style, with fix suggestions and diagrams. Plus IDE plugins and a CLI.

skills.name: AI PR Review
skills.description: Reviews pull requests across GitHub, GitLab, Azure DevOps, and Bitbucket, flagging bugs and style issues.

skills.name: Fix Suggestions
skills.description: Proposes concrete one-click code fixes and explanations inline on the diff during review.

skills.name: Architecture Diagrams
skills.description: Generates diff summaries and architectural diagrams to explain the impact of a change under review.
